APPROVE
Clean migration. The single test was rewritten as five subtests that each spin up a real git repo, encode the scenario as script-harness directives (no-op, commit, set-exit, fail-during, sibling-conflict), and assert on the supervisor-visible Status produced by the full ExecuteBead → Land pipeline. Scope discipline is intact — no other tests touched, no surface shrinkage, every original assertion's intent preserved.
